name: cygwin
description: Install Cygwin from cygwin64.tgz and enable basic postinstall setup.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log} = Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\cygwin-verify.log'; & 'C:\cygwin64\bin\bash.exe' -lc 'uname -a; which bash' | Tee-Object -FilePath ${log}; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $env:ProgramData 'MAST\logs\cygwin-smoke.txt') -Value 'cygwin_ok'"
